subject: Koko and Hoppy discover a secret garden
preview_text: A gentle story about curiosity, bravery, and three simple English words to practice together.
intro: This week, Koko and Hoppy follow a hidden path behind the big oak tree. Hoppy feels curious and a little nervous, so Koko stays by her side. Together they discover glowing flowers, dancing fireflies, and a calm reminder that bravery can begin with one small step.

learning_words.example: Koko and Hoppy discover glowing flowers.
They looked at the fireflies with wonder.

parent_activity: After watching, invite your child to draw a tiny secret garden. Ask: What would you discover there? Then practice one sentence together: I can discover something beautiful.
video_cta: Watch the episode with your child: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NW_RHZDPKUU
site_cta: For more Koko parent resources and bilingual learning ideas, visit https://fursay.com/koko
closing: Curiosity grows when children feel safe to explore. This story is a soft way to practice courage, friendship, and wonder before bedtime.
